name: Ningbo Daye Garden Machinery Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Daye Garden Machinery Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells garden power tools and garden watering products in China and internationally. It offers cordless garden tools, petrol lawnmowers, electric lawnmowers, electric grass trimmers, blower vacs, cultivators, snow throwers trimmers and brush cutters, and robotic mowers. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Yuyao, China.
